DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDNA VIERYA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar per Ex Parte Order of May 31, 2013 granting Plaintiff leave to file an amended complaint. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT EDNA VIERYA'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot. Plaintiff filed First Amended Complaint on March 27, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
